summary: Tested new features: AI Poster Generation (GPT Image 1), 8 skill-based challenge battles, online bonus (+15%), dashboard changes, and VS section updates. Backend: 11/11 tests passed. Frontend: Dashboard verified (no contest stats card), VS section verified (3 tabs, no refresh button in empty state).
critical_code_review_comments: AI Poster endpoint (POST /api/ai/poster) working correctly - generates ~2.5MB base64 images using GPT Image 1
Challenge system returns 'skill_battles' array with 8 entries (direction, cinematography, screenplay, acting, soundtrack, effects, editing, charisma)
Online bonus (+15%) correctly applied in calculate_challenge_rewards function
Dashboard no longer has daily/weekly challenge tabs - navigation cards (Festivals, Create Film, Pre-Engage, Mini Games, Social, Challenges) present
VS section has 3 tabs and NO refresh button in empty state as expected
IMDb rating card has data-testid='imdb-rating-card' and showImdbDetail state for popup
context_for_next_testing_agent: New features tested: 1) AI poster generation via POST /api/ai/poster returns base64 data URLs (~2.5MB). 2) Challenge system has 8 skill-based battles (skill_battles array). 3) Online bonus is 15% on rewards. 4) Dashboard removed contest stats card with daily/weekly tabs. 5) VS section at /games has no refresh button. 6) IMDb rating popup is implemented on FilmDetail page with data-testid='imdb-rating-card'.

features_tested.POST /api/ai/poster: PASSED - Returns poster_url starting with 'data:' (base64 image, ~2.5MB)
features_tested.Challenge skill_battles array: PASSED - 8 skill battles with proper structure
features_tested.Online bonus 15%: PASSED - calculate_challenge_rewards applies 15% bonus when is_online=True
features_tested.Dashboard no contest stats: PASSED - No daily/weekly tabs card visible, navigation cards present
features_tested.VS section no refresh button: PASSED - Empty state shows message without refresh button
features_tested.IMDb rating card clickable: CODE VERIFIED - data-testid present, onClick handler sets showImdbDetail(true)
